description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish MISC Packages that publishes various packages (MSI, MATLAB, XCFramework, Swift, Brew) to S3. The workflow can be triggered manually with a channel and run ID, and it uses these inputs to download artifacts from a previous workflow run and then upload them to S3. The workflow runs on ubuntu-24.04 and macos-15 environments, and it uses AWS credentials and GitHub tokens to authenticate with S3 and GitHub APIs.
